---
description: Propose a new change - create it and generate all artifacts in one step
agent: Planner
argument-hint: Change name or description (e.g., "add user settings page")
---

Use the **openspec-propose** skill to create a new change and generate all artifacts.

Pass the user's input (if any) as the change name or description. If no input is provided, the skill will ask what to build.

All artifact creation steps, dependency ordering, and guardrails are defined in the skill — follow them exactly.
